This is a post with executable code.

## Parametric Plots

Plot function pair (x(u), y(u)). 


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
pacman::p_load(ggplot2)

f <- function(x) sin(2*x)
xs <- seq(1, 2 * 3.14, 0.01)
ys <- sapply(xs, f)

ggplot(data.frame(x = xs, y = ys)) + geom_line(aes(x, y)) + theme_bw()
```
